## Summary

## Protocol and Authority Checklist

- [ ] Client sends only input intent, deck/mode requests, and display-safe metadata.
- [ ] Client does not author score, hit, graze, reward, boss HP, or settlement state.
- [ ] New player-facing text uses i18n keys.
- [ ] New assets are original or licensed and recorded in `godot/assets/asset_manifest.json`.
- [ ] Relevant smoke/static checks were run locally or are covered by CI.
